message:
🌱 cert-manager: Certificate creation is stuck with Order having no state and no challenges are (#1842)

* 🌱 Add cert-manager: Certificate creation is stuck with Order having no state mission

* 🌱 Add cert-manager: Certificate creation is stuck with Order having no state mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-2741-certificate-creation-is-stuck-with-order-having-no-state-and-n",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Certificate creation is stuck with Order having no state and no challenges are created for a specific URL",
+    "description": "Certificate creation is stuck with Order having no state and no challenges are created for a specific URL. This issue affects 27+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cert-manager troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cert-manager deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nCertificate creation is stuck for a specific host URL\nOrder has no state and no challenges are created."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Certificate creation is stuck with Order having no state…",
+        "description": "cert-manager logs upon creation of the ingress rule for the aforementioned specific URL \n```\n\nI0325 1147.506645       1 controller.go:138] cert-manager/controller/ingress-shim \"msg\"=\"syncing item\" \"key\"=\"pp/hybris-ingress\"\nI0325 1147.518624       1 controller.go:144]\n```yaml\n> kubectl rollout restart deployment -n cert-manager cert-manager\n>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Certificate creation is stuck with Order having… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "cert-manager logs upon creation of the ingress rule for the aforementioned specific URL \n```\n\nI0325 1147.506645       1 controller.go:138] cert-manager/controller/ingress-shim \"msg\"=\"syncing item\" \"key\"=\"pp/hybris-ingress\"\nI0325 1147.518624       1 controller.go:144] cert-manager/controller/ingress-shim \"msg\"=\"finished processing work item\" \"key\"=\"pp/hybris-ingress\"\nI0325 1147.518907       1",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> kubectl rollout restart deployment -n cert-manager cert-manager\n>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cert-manager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/2741",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager"
+    },
+    "reactions": 27,
+    "comments": 28,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:37:58.259Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
